mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE role = 'STUDENT'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_credit_apply WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(credit_score), 0) FROM sys_credit_apply WHERE status = 1

SELECT academic_year AS academicYear, COUNT(*) AS applyCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS approvedCount, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN credit_score ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalCredits FROM sys_credit_apply GROUP BY academic_year ORDER BY academic_year DESC

SELECT a.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS nickname, SUM(a.credit_score) AS totalCredits FROM sys_credit_apply a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.status = 1 GROUP BY a.user_id, u.nickname ORDER BY totalCredits DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT academic_year AS academicYear, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS studentCount, COUNT(*) AS awardCount, IFNULL(SUM(credit_score), 0) AS totalCredits FROM sys_credit_apply WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY academic_year ORDER BY academic_year DESC
